summary: P2 Player Statistics & Leaderboard feature testing complete. All backend stats endpoints working (18/20 tests passed - 2 unrelated auth-required endpoints). Frontend leaderboard page with podium, period tabs, sort buttons all functional. Kiosk locked screen shows 'Top Spieler heute' rotation correctly.

minor.issue: Returns 401 without auth (expected behavior, not a bug)
Returns 401 without auth (expected behavior, not a bug)

passed_tests: GET /api/stats/leaderboard?sort_by=win_rate sorts by win rate correctly
Player stats structure verified: nickname, games_played, games_won, win_rate, avg_score, best_checkout, highest_throw
GET /api/stats/player/Max returns found=true with stats (6 games, 6 wins, 100% win_rate, best_checkout=120, highest_throw=180)
GET /api/stats/top-today returns top 5 players of the day with date
POST /api/kiosk/{board_id}/end-game accepts winner and scores in body
POST /api/kiosk/{board_id}/end-game works without body (uses fallback winner)
/admin/leaderboard shows podium (top 3 players) with rank badges
/admin/leaderboard has period tabs: Heute, Woche, Monat, Gesamt (German)
/admin/leaderboard has sort buttons: Siege, Spiele, Quote (German)
/admin/leaderboard shows player table with highest_throw and best_checkout in Details
Kiosk locked screen shows 'Top Spieler heute' rotation widget
Kiosk top player rotation displays player name (Max) with stats (6W / 6G)
Kiosk top player rotation animates (player changed from Max to TEST after 6s)
Kiosk pricing info displayed (Pro Spiel, 30 Min, 60 Min in EUR)
Dashboard shows BOARD-1 and BOARD-2 with GESPERRT status
critical_code_review_comments: Stats computed correctly from MatchResult records with best_checkout and highest_throw from scores JSON
German localization consistent: Heute, Woche, Monat, Gesamt, Siege, Spiele, Quote
Top players rotation on kiosk locked screen fetches /api/stats/top-today and rotates every 5 seconds
Leaderboard sorting verified for games_won, games_played, win_rate

success_rate.backend: 100% of P2 stats endpoints (18/20 overall - 2 auth-required existing endpoints)

seed_data_present: Max (6 games, 6 wins), Lisa (1 game, 1 win), Tom (1 game, 0 wins), TEST users from previous tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: P2 Stats & Leaderboard fully tested. Key endpoints: GET /api/stats/leaderboard (params: period, sort_by, limit), GET /api/stats/player/{nickname}, GET /api/stats/top-today. Stats computed from MatchResult records. Leaderboard UI has podium (top 3), full table, period tabs (Heute/Woche/Monat/Gesamt), sort buttons (Siege/Spiele/Quote). Kiosk locked screen shows rotating top players with 5-second interval. All German localization working. WebSocket warning in console is non-critical (connection closed before established - likely from page navigation).
